title: Chalk & Talk vs. PowerPoint Process Flow for Inner Product Spaces
description: A comparison flowchart illustrating the teaching-learning process for Inner Product Spaces using both traditional chalk-and-talk and modern PowerPoint presentation methods.
relationships: Instructor (Chalk & Talk) uses Blackboard to perform Step-by-Step Derivation, fostering direct Student Engagement
Instructor (PowerPoint) displays Pre-built Slides featuring Visualization of Concepts, which facilitates Student Review
